context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: My Java app sends traces fine but I want to add a custom span to a specific method. How do I do it without changing the

checklist.name: no-if-it-suggests-rewriting-the-exporter-setu
checklist.description: Describes the @WithSpan annotation approach — noting that the opentelemetry-instrumentation-annotations dependency is required without listing installation commands, and annotating the target method. Mentions that the Java agent must already be running for @WithSpan to work. FAIL if it suggests rewriting the exporter setup or adding manual SDK init code.
